openQuestions.text: Commit range triage by phase surface
Phase 003 drift (positive control: cc77a1e550a renamed files + behavior_benchmark/ glob)
Phase 013 + OPEN QUESTION A: did 6cd8ab14e4e / 708d25acf04 / 908efde8d8f change the registered-mode count?
Phases 016-017 + OPEN QUESTION B: does packet-033 benchmark dependency survive its renumber?

resolvedQuestions.text: Commit range triage by phase surface
resolvedQuestions.verdict: 205 commits in range (25 system-deep-loop); per-phase hit-list produced.
First-order drift reproduced. cc77a1e550a renamed state_format.md, integration_points.md, and behavior_benchmark/; kebab siblings exist and preserve content. Phase 003 verdict = needs refinement.

Mode count unchanged at 7 routing modes (8 workstreams = 7 routing + 1 shared backbone). Second-order drift on defaultMode (research->null), hub-identity (dropped), model/skill-benchmark signals (command-bridge-only). Phase 013 verdict = needs refinement.

All three still valid. Phase 004 zero drift (negative-control candidate). Phase 005 paths resolve, premise intact (cli-codex argv starts with exec), deliverables unshipped. Phase 006 zero drift (negative-control candidate).

All three still valid. Phase 007 zero drift (negative-control candidate; iter 1 low-medium rating over-cautious). Phase 008 zero drift. Phase 009 zero drift; flat-pool-vs-wave guard still TRUE at fanout-run.cjs:331-334; deliverables unshipped.

Phase 010 still valid (zero drift; claim continuity != session continuity). Phase 011 still valid (zero drift; council/convergence.cjs anchor intact). Phase 012 needs refinement (HIGH risk materialized second-order: shared mode boundary grew by 5 components - resourceContractVersion, defaultMode null, signal restrictions, smart_routing.md, leaf-manifest.json).

Both still valid. Phase 014 zero drift (transitive second-order from phase 013 bounded to test fixtures). Phase 015 zero drift in plan; transitive dependency on phase-003 path refinement documented (execution readiness waits on phase-003, plan well-formed).

Phase 016 still valid (transitive on phase-003 refinement; 72c36121201 touches skill-benchmark harness not whole-system gate). Phase 017 still valid (charter executing now). OPEN QUESTION B resolved: dependency SURVIVES at z_archive/027 (full content), but phase 003 MUST rebase 'Packet 033' reference - additional first-order drift missed by iter 1, attributable to 7f3216fc502 (renumber, 12.5h after baseline).
Phase 004 locked as negative control (zero drift, no runtime citations, no transitive deps on drifted phases; cleanest of three zero-drift candidates 004/006/007).
